_comment: Reference copy of ~/.claude/settings.json — DO NOT symlink this file. cc-dotfiles merges into the real settings.json, so it must remain a regular file. Use this as a guide for what to configure.

env._comment_sail: /sail model allocation (codex builds / claude reviews per the #83 cross-family invariant). SAIL_REVIEW_CMD2 and SAIL_TIDINESS_VERIFY_CMD are intentionally absent — see commands/sail.md.
env._comment_sail_prose: #133: prose/spec-heavy builds route here — a MORE CAPABLE codex (gpt-5.5) for delicate prose surgery, kept in the codex family so it stays cross-family vs the claude reviewer (#83). Do NOT set this to a claude backend: that collapses cross-family review on every prose build (build.json records cross_family:lost → ALERT).
env._comment_sail_learn: SAIL_LEARN_CMD (#147): the cheap LLM pass for the post-terminus learning loop (root-cause grouping of blocking findings into PROPOSED domain.md rules). Optional — if unset, sail learn falls back to the review lens (SAIL_REVIEW_CMD); if neither is set/runnable the learning step cleanly no-ops. A cheap model is appropriate.
env._comment_sail_cost_ceiling: SAIL_COST_CEILING_SECONDS: unset uses the documented 14400s (4h) default; override with a positive seconds value. 0/non-positive/unparseable disables the ceiling (fails open).

hooks._comment_hooks: cc-dotfiles installs its own hooks via install.sh. The CK-Skills hooks below need manual wiring after symlinking. Both sets coexist under the same event keys.

Notification._comment: cc-dotfiles: macOS notification sound on model output

PostToolUse._comment: cc-dotfiles: auto-format Python files + update CRG graph after edits

PreToolUse._comment: CK-Skills: soft gate — injects research checklist before edits
CK-Skills: local TDD guard — requires a failing sail test marker before source edits

statusLine._comment: cc-dotfiles: shows pipeline stage + issue in the status bar
